title: Arcane Gearsets
description: A mod that enhances the progression of Minecraft through alternate gearsets branching from diamond in a completely vanilla-friendly way.
body:
## Overview

Tired of Netherite being the ultimate armor? Arcane Gearsets introduces new armor sets and upgrade templates that extend Minecraft’s progression beyond Diamond and Netherite. 

## Features

✅ New Armor Progression – Go beyond Netherite with advanced gear options.

✅ New Upgrade Templates – Found throughout the world, these allow for powerful customization.

✅ Vanilla-Friendly Integration – Balanced and designed to fit naturally into the game.

## How to Obtain
- Aquatic Upgrade Templates can be discovered in  Shipwreck Treasure Chests.
- Trial Upgrade Templates drop from Ominous Vaults.

## Why Arcane Gearsets?
Minecraft’s armor progression can feel limited—Arcane Gearsets expands upon the current system, offering more meaningful choices and deeper progression without breaking vanilla balance.

## Future Plans
- Additional late-game armor sets
- More upgrade mechanics and unique effects



💬 Feedback & Suggestions Welcome! – Let us know what you think and what features you'd like to see next!
